creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-27 08:45:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
    x11/oooqs2           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    x11/oooqs2/files     patch-configure 
  Log:
  - Add oooq2 port
  
  OpenOffice.org Quickstarter is a small application that runs in the KDE
  SystemTray. It is used to quickly start the different OpenOffice.org
  modules without having to go through the K-Menu.
  
  This port provided quickstarter only for OpenOffice 2.x
  
  Author: segfault_ii@web.de
  WWW:   http://developer.berlios.de/projects/segfaultskde/
  
  PR:             110382
  Submitted by:   Rashid N. Achilov <achilov-rn@askd.ru>
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.651     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.15      +18 -12    ports/x11/oooqs2/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -3      ports/x11/oooqs2/distinfo
  1.3       +0 -420    ports/x11/oooqs2/files/patch-configure (dead)
  1.3       +5 -3      ports/x11/oooqs2/pkg-descr
  1.7       +33 -21    ports/x11/oooqs2/pkg-plist
